title: Thoughtworks Technology Radar — Structural Index Schema (karak)
description: Schema for karak's per-volume structural index of the Thoughtworks Technology Radar. Bump $schema_version when ring/quadrant enums or record shape change. Per-volume facts live in volumes/v<NN>/manifest.json.

blip.description: Factual structural record for a single Radar blip. Does NOT contain the Thoughtworks-authored summary text (those are fetched on demand into a per-user cache outside this distribution).

name.description: The blip name exactly as it appears on the Radar.

ring.description: Vol.34+ uses 'Caution' (replaces older 'Hold'). 'Hold' kept for back-compat when referencing older volumes.

volume.description: Volume in which this blip currently appears (or last appeared).

radar_url.description: Canonical Thoughtworks URL for this blip's detail page. Source of truth for summary text — fetch on demand.

tags.description: karak-curated categorical tags (e.g., 'ai', 'security', 'agentic', 'observability'). NOT a Thoughtworks classification.

note.description: OPTIONAL karak-authored editorial note. MUST NOT contain Thoughtworks-authored prose.

theme.description: Factual structural record for a Radar theme. Does NOT contain the Thoughtworks-authored narrative text.

title.description: Theme title as published. Short titular phrase — factual, not creative prose.

source_url.description: Page hosting the theme narrative. Currently themes are inline on /radar.

related_blip_names.description: karak-curated list of blips this theme bundles. Must use blip names that exist in blips.json.

our_synthesis.description: OPTIONAL karak-authored editorial framing note. MUST NOT quote Thoughtworks narrative prose.
